name: behavioral-profile-system
description: Questionnaire-driven behavioral profile catalog for website integration.

questions.text: When you start something new, what helps you feel most confident?

options.C: A chance to ask people for input
options.D: Time to understand the bigger picture

questions.text: Which school task usually gives you the most energy?

options.B: Turning ideas into a creative project

questions.text: In class discussions, you naturally tend to:

options.A: Summarize and keep the group on track
options.B: Offer a fresh angle nobody mentioned
options.C: Notice who has not spoken yet
options.D: Ask a question that goes deeper

questions.text: In a group project, do you prefer to:
When you face a difficult decision, you trust:
What kind of challenge feels most rewarding?

options.A: Improving a system that is inefficient
options.D: Solving a puzzle with no obvious answer

questions.text: If you had a free afternoon, you would rather:

options.B: Work on a personal side project
options.C: Spend time with a group of friends
options.D: Read or watch something that teaches you something new

questions.text: What usually frustrates you the most?
Which environment helps you do your best work?
When learning something complex, your first instinct is to:

options.B: Relate it to something creative or personal

questions.text: What makes an accomplishment feel meaningful to you?

options.A: Seeing a plan work exactly as intended
options.C: Knowing it made a difference for others

questions.text: Which role do you often take in a team without trying?
If a project suddenly changes direction, you usually:

options.B: Adapt and look for opportunity in the shift
options.C: Check how the change affects everyone
options.D: Ask what evidence led to the change

questions.text: What kind of feedback helps you grow the most?
Which future sounds the most appealing right now?

options.C: Working in a role centered on people and impact
options.D: Exploring big questions through research and analysis

questions.text: At the end of this module, what would feel most useful?

options.A: A roadmap with concrete next steps
options.B: A profile that reflects your creative strengths
options.C: Clarity about the kinds of roles where you can help people
options.D: Insight into the problems you are naturally drawn to solve

method.primary_rule: Count answer patterns holistically, not mechanically. Use question meaning and highlighted priority questions to infer dominant and secondary styles.
method.assignment_logic: If the top signal exceeds the second signal by 12 or more points, assign the single-core profile. Otherwise, assign a hybrid profile using the top two signals.

profiles.label: Architect Operator
profiles.title: The Architect Operator
profiles.short_description: A structured, dependable profile that prefers clarity, planning, and execution.

behaviour.works_best_when: goals are clear, timelines are defined, and responsibilities are explicit
behaviour.decision_style: prefers structured comparison and practical next steps
behaviour.learning_style: likes breaking complexity into manageable parts
behaviour.team_style: naturally organizes, coordinates, and keeps work moving

watchouts: can become frustrated by chaos or vague direction
may overvalue control when flexibility is needed
can move too quickly into structure before exploration is complete

profiles.label: Creative Builder
profiles.title: The Creative Builder
profiles.short_description: An imaginative, self-directed profile that is energized by originality, experimentation, and building new things.

behaviour.works_best_when: there is room to test ideas, shape concepts, and create something distinct
behaviour.decision_style: leans toward intuition, possibility, and personal fit
behaviour.learning_style: connects new ideas to creative or personal meaning
behaviour.team_style: brings fresh angles, possibility thinking, and momentum for new concepts

watchouts: can resist rigid structure
may lose energy in repetitive systems
can underweight detail or consistency if not supported

profiles.label: Supportive Guide
profiles.title: The Supportive Guide
profiles.short_description: A people-centered profile that values trust, encouragement, and meaningful impact on others.

behaviour.works_best_when: relationships are healthy, collaboration is valued, and work has human meaning
behaviour.decision_style: takes into account trust, people impact, and group wellbeing
behaviour.learning_style: likes dialogue, exchange, and real human context
behaviour.team_style: encourages participation, notices group dynamics, and helps others contribute

watchouts: can overextend to maintain harmony
may delay hard calls if people tension is high
can absorb too much emotional responsibility

profiles.label: Deep Investigator
profiles.title: The Deep Investigator
profiles.short_description: A thoughtful, analytical profile that is energized by logic, depth, evidence, and intellectually challenging problems.

behaviour.works_best_when: there is space for concentration, complexity, and rigorous thinking
behaviour.decision_style: relies on evidence, reasoning, and underlying logic
behaviour.learning_style: prefers understanding systems, principles, and deeper patterns
behaviour.team_style: brings analysis, critical questions, and conceptual clarity

strengths: sees hidden assumptions and weak reasoning
watchouts: can become impatient with shallow thinking
may overanalyze before acting
can appear distant in highly social settings

profiles.label: Systems Innovator
profiles.title: The Systems Innovator
profiles.short_description: A profile that combines creativity with structure, able to turn fresh ideas into usable systems.

behaviour.works_best_when: there is freedom to invent, but also a path to make ideas real
behaviour.learning_style: likes applied creativity and structured experimentation
behaviour.team_style: moves between idea generation and implementation

strengths: creates usable systems from rough ideas
watchouts: may feel constrained in rigid environments
can get frustrated by slow-moving teams
may oscillate between exploration and over-structuring

profiles.label: People-Centered Operator
profiles.title: The People-Centered Operator
profiles.short_description: A dependable, organized profile that wants work to be both well-run and supportive of people.

behaviour.works_best_when: expectations are clear and collaboration is respectful
behaviour.decision_style: balances practical structure with people impact
behaviour.learning_style: prefers guided clarity and applied understanding
behaviour.team_style: coordinates work while keeping others supported

strengths: balances task needs with human needs
watchouts: can over-carry responsibility for both process and people
may avoid necessary friction to preserve harmony
can become stressed when both chaos and conflict appear together

profiles.label: Insight Strategist
profiles.title: The Insight Strategist
profiles.short_description: A strategic, composed profile that combines structure with analysis and wants things to make sense before moving.

behaviour.works_best_when: the environment is focused, organized, and intellectually serious
behaviour.decision_style: prefers evidence, comparison, and strong reasoning
behaviour.learning_style: likes logic, frameworks, and conceptual structure
behaviour.team_style: brings planning, prioritization, and analytical judgment

strengths: sees both execution needs and analytical depth
watchouts: can become rigid when evidence is incomplete
may undervalue intuition or emotional context
can appear overly critical in low-rigor environments

profiles.label: Vision Catalyst
profiles.title: The Vision Catalyst
profiles.short_description: A creative, energizing profile that combines originality with human connection and shared momentum.

behaviour.works_best_when: the environment is collaborative, open-minded, and receptive to new ideas
behaviour.learning_style: engages best when ideas feel alive, relevant, and discussable

strengths: works well in expressive collaborative spaces
watchouts: can dislike hard constraints
may underemphasize rigor or detail
can struggle when energy is low and structure is heavy

profiles.label: Creative Analyst
profiles.title: The Creative Analyst
profiles.short_description: A profile that blends originality with depth, often drawn to building thoughtful, distinctive, and intellectually rich work.

behaviour.works_best_when: there is freedom to explore ideas deeply and shape something distinctive
behaviour.learning_style: likes exploring logic, patterns, and unusual perspectives
behaviour.team_style: contributes original thinking with strong depth

strengths: works well in ambiguity with meaning
watchouts: can get stuck refining ideas
may resist oversimplification
can feel underused in repetitive delivery roles

profiles.label: Thoughtful Facilitator
profiles.title: The Thoughtful Facilitator
profiles.short_description: A reflective, people-aware profile that combines empathy with depth and tends to support others through thoughtful understanding.

behaviour.works_best_when: the work involves both human context and thoughtful problem-solving
behaviour.decision_style: considers both evidence and relational impact
behaviour.team_style: offers grounded support, careful questions, and insight into people dynamics

strengths: reads both people and problems well
helps teams think more clearly and humanely
watchouts: can carry too much reflective weight
may hesitate when forced into fast, impersonal decisions
can become frustrated by both shallow thinking and cold team dynamics
